<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[fr:Clan Yagi]][[ja:八木氏]]
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[fr:Clan Yagi]][[ja:八木氏]]
<!--interwikis from wikidata-->[[fr:Clan Yagi]][[ja:八木氏]]





{{Infobox Japanese clan|||draft
| type = Shinto
| father = {{ill|Watatsumi|en|Watatsumi|WD=Q1474187|lt=Watatsumi|1=Watatsumi}}
| mother = 
| image = File:Yagi Shrine Torii closeup.jpg
| caption = {{ill|Yagi Shrine|ja|夜疑神社|simple|User:Immanuelle/Yagi Shrine|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yagi Shrine|qq=}} their historical shrine
| cult_centre = {{ill|Yagi Shrine|ja|夜疑神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yagi Shrine|qq=}}
| cult_center = {{ill|Yagi Shrine|ja|夜疑神社|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yagi Shrine|qq=}}
| children = {{ill|Takeuioki-no-Mikoto|ja|武位起命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Takeuioki-no-Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}''' , {{ill|Amanosakitama no mikoto|ja|天前玉命|lt1=Amanosakitama no mikoto|lt2=尾張国造|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Amanosakitama no mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}} , {{ill|Kuroshima Isone hime|ja|黒島磯根御気姫命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kuroshima Isone hime|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}''', '''{{ill|Ōnotehime-no-Kami|lt=Ōnotehime-no-Kami|lt=Onotehime|lt=Ohonutehime|ja|大野手比売|1=Ōnotehime-no-Kami|2=ja|3=大野手比売|lt=Ōnotehime-no-Kami|lt2=大鐸比売命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Onotehime|13=User:Immanuelle/Ōnotehime-no-Kami|qq=}}'''
|surname=Yagi|surname nihongo=八木|alt=Yagi Shrine their historical shrine|image caption={{ill|Yagi Shrine|ja|夜疑神社|simple|User:Immanuelle/Yagi Shrine|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yagi Shrine|qq=}} their historical shrine|home province={{ill|Kawachi Province|en|Kawachi Province|WD=Q1047150|lt=Kawachi Province|1=Kawachi Province}}|province of origin={{ill|Kawachi Province|en|Kawachi Province|WD=Q1047150|lt=Kawachi Province|1=Kawachi Province}}|founder={{ill|Yatamiko-no-Mikoto|ja|八玉彦命|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yatamiko-no-Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}}}

{{Expand Japanese}}

{{ill|Yagi clan|ja|八木氏|6=simple|7=User:Immanuelle/Yagi clan|8=en:draft|complete=true|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yagi clan|qq=}}
is a [[Japanese clans|Japanese clan]] descended from {{ill|Furutama-no-Mikoto|ja|布留多摩命|simple|User:Immanuelle/Furutama|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Furutama-no-Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}. Their shrine is {{ill|Yagi Shrine|ja|夜疑神社|simple|User:Immanuelle/Yagi Shrine|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yagi Shrine|qq=}}.<ref name="www.norichan.jp">{{Cite web|title=夜疑神社|url=http://www.norichan.jp/jinja/benkyou2/yagi.htm|access-date=2023-12-13|website=www.norichan.jp}}</ref> Where they worshipped their ancestral deity {{ill|Furutama-no-Mikoto|ja|布留多摩命|6=simple|7=User:Immanuelle/Furutama|8=en:draft|9=Furutama-no-Mikoto|10=fr|11=Furutama-no-Mikoto|lt=Furutama|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Furutama-no-Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.<ref>{{Cite web|date=2016-08-18|title=��^�_�Ђ̌�Ր_|url=https://web.archive.org/web/20160818202730/http://orange.zero.jp/hara.park/saijin.html|access-date=2024-03-23|website=web.archive.org}}</ref><ref name="www.norichan.jp" />

They owned {{ill|Wakasa Oniga Castle|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Wakasa Oniga Castle|qq=}}

== History ==
It is unknown when the {{ill|Yagi clan|ja|八木氏|6=simple|7=User:Immanuelle/Yagi clan|8=en:draft|complete=true|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yagi clan|qq=}} built {{ill|Yagi Shrine|ja|夜疑神社|simple|User:Immanuelle/Yagi Shrine|en|Draft:Yagi Shrine|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yagi Shrine|qq=}}, but it is also mentioned in the [[Engishiki|Engishiki]], which was created during the {{ill|Heian period|en|Heian period|WD=Q193292|lt=Heian period|1=Heian period}}<ref>{{Cite web|title=御由緒 {{!}} 夜疑神社【大阪府岸和田市】交通安全・厄除け祈願|url=https://www.yagi-jinja.jp/about/|access-date=2024-03-23|website=www.yagi-jinja.jp}}</ref>. In the {{ill|Shinsen Shōjiroku|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Shinsen Shōjiroku|qq=}} compiled in the early Heian period, there is a description indicates that the Yagi clan, an ancient powerful clan, enshrined their ancestral deity, {{ill|Furutama-no-Mikoto|ja|布留多摩命|6=simple|7=User:Immanuelle/Furutama|8=en:draft|9=Furutama-no-Mikoto|10=fr|11=Furutama-no-Mikoto|lt=Furutama|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Furutama-no-Mikoto|ja_comment=jawiki link invalid}}.  {{Sfn|岸和田市観光振興協会|1993}} . 

{{Short description|Japanese Kamakura-period castle}}

The Yagi clan ruled {{ill|Yagi Castle|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yagi Castle|qq=}} and the surrounding area for centuries. During the {{ill|Muromachi period|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Muromachi period|qq=}}, Tajima came under the control of the powerful {{ill|Yamana clan|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yamana clan|qq=}}, and the Yagi accepted the Yamana as overlords. However, following the {{ill|Onin War|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Onin War|qq=}} the power of the Yamana was greatly weakened. In 1575, the 15th castellan of Yagi Castle, Yagi Toyonobu was approached by both the {{ill|Mōri clan|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Mōri clan|qq=}} from the west, and {{ill|Oda Nobunaga|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Oda Nobunaga|qq=}} from the east. Initially, the Yagi cooperated with the Mōri, but in 1579 surrendered to Nobunaga's general, {{ill|Toyotomi Hidenaga|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyotomi Hidenaga|qq=}} in exchange for being allowed to keep their castle and territory. As per the terms of his surrender, Yagi Toyonobu was ordered to lead an army against the Mōri at {{ill|Tottori Castle|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tottori Castle|qq=}} in 1580 and was ordered togaed Wakasa Oni-ga-jo Castle (also in Tottori). He was defeated in a counterattack by Mori forces in 1581, and went missing-in-action. Consequently, {{ill|Toyotomi Hideyoshi|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Toyotomi Hideyoshi|qq=}}  seized Yagi Castle and awarded it to {{ill|Bessho Shigemune|ja|別所重宗|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Bessho Shigemune|1=Bessho Shigemune|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q11396808}} as part of a 15,000 ''{{ill|koku|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/koku|qq=}}'' fief.<ref name="Shiseki">{{cite book|last1=Isomura |first1=Yukio |last2=Sakai |first2=Hideya |title=(国指定史跡事典) National Historic Site Encyclopedia |date=2012 |publisher=学生社 |isbn=4311750404|qq=draft}}
{{in lang|ja}}</ref>

== Family tree ==
{{User:Immanuelle/Generations of Watatsumi}}

==Famous members==

* {{ill|Yagi Toyonobu|ja|八木豊信|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yagi Toyonobu|1=Yagi Toyonobu|comment=changed title based on wikidata|WD=Q17230567}}

==Gallery==
<gallery>
Yagijtutij05.jpg|Ruins of old Yagi Castle
Yagijyou09.jpg|Foundations of a building in Yagi Castle
Yagijyou05.jpg|Site of Ni-no-maru Enclosure
Yagijyou03.jpg|View from Yagi Castle
</gallery>

==See Also==

* {{ill|Yamato no Kuni no Miyatsuko|en|Yamato no Kuni no Miyatsuko|WD=Q11387078|lt=Yamato clan|1=Yamato no Kuni no Miyatsuko}}
* {{ill|Izumo clan|en|4=simple|5=User:Immanuelle/Izumo clan|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Izumo clan|qq=}}
* {{ill|Aso clan|en|Aso clan|WD=Q11657653|lt=Aso clan|1=Aso clan}}
* {{ill|Owari clan|en|Owari clan|WD=Q11465311|lt=Owari clan|1=Owari clan}}
* {{ill|Tsumori clan|ja|津守氏|en:draft|6=simple|7=User:Immanuelle/Tsumori clan|8=fr|9=User:Immanuelle/Tsumori clan|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tsumori clan|qq=}}
* {{ill|Amabe clan|en|Amabe clan|WD=Q65272445|lt=Amabe clan|1=Amabe clan}}
* {{ill|Tanba clan|ja|丹波氏|1=Tanba clan|2=ja|3=丹波氏|4=ko|5=단바씨|6=simple|7=User:Immanuelle/Tanba clan|en:draft|6=simple|7=User:Immanuelle/Tanba clan|8=fr|9=User:Immanuelle/Tanba clan|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Tanba clan|13=User:Immanuelle/Tanba clan|qq=}}
* {{ill|Urabe clan|lt=Urabe clan|ja|卜部氏|en|draft:Yoshida family|simple|User:Immanuelle/Urabe_clan|fr|clan Urabe|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Urabe clan|qq=}}
* {{ill|Sarume clan|lt=Sarume clan|simple|User:Immanuelle/Sarume clan|en:draft|6=ja|7=猿女君|10=fr|11=Utilisateur:Immanuelle/Clan Sarume|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Sarume clan|qq=}}
* {{ill|Kii no Kuni no Miyatsuko|ja|紀伊国造|simple|User:Immanuelle/Kii no Kuni no Miyatsuko|en|draft:Kii no Kuni no Miyatsuko|fr|Utilisateur:Immanuelle/Kii_no_Kuni_no_Miyatsuko|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Kii no Kuni no Miyatsuko|qq=}}
* {{ill|Munakata clan|ja|宗像氏|simple|User:Immanuelle/Munakata_clan|ja|宗像氏|fr|Utilisateur:Immanuelle/Clan Munakata|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Munakata clan|qq=}}
* {{ill|Yagi clan|ja|八木氏|6=simple|7=User:Immanuelle/Yagi clan|8=en:draft|10=fr|11=Utilisateur:Immanuelle/Clan Yagi|complete=true|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/Yagi clan|qq=}}
* {{ill|List of Historic Sites of Japan (Hyōgo)|en|12=simple|13=User:Immanuelle/List of Historic Sites of Japan (Hyōgo)|qq=}}
* [[User:Immanuelle/Yagimura]]
==References==
<references group="lower-alpha"/>
{{reflist}}

==Further reading==
*{{cite book|title=An Encyclopedia of Japanese Castles | last=De Lange |first=William |year=2021 |pages=600 pages|publisher=Toyo Press |location=Groningen |isbn=978-9492722300|qq=draft}}
*Frederic, Louis (2002). "Chihaya-jō." <u>Japan Encyclopedia.</u> Cambridge, Massachusetts: Harvard University Press.
*Sansom, George (1961). "A History of Japan: 1334-1615." Stanford, California: Stanford University Press. pp123–4
*Turnbull, Stephen (1998). 'The Samurai Sourcebook'. London: Cassell & Co.
*{{cite book | title=Japanese Castles| last=Motoo| first=Hinago| date=1986| pages= 200 pages| publisher=Kodansha| location=Tokyo| isbn=0-87011-766-1}}

==External links==
*{{commons category-inline|Yagi Castle (Tajima)}}
*[https://www.city.yabu.hyogo.jp/soshiki/kyoikuiinkai/shakaikyoiku/1/4/yagi/2534.html Yabu City home page]{{in lang|ja}}
*[https://www.yabu-kankou.jp/sightseeing/yagijyo Yabu City Department of Tourism]{{in lang|ja}}
*[https://www.hyogo-tourism.jp/spot/833 Hyōgo Prefecture Department of Tourism]{{in lang|ja}}

}}
{{⚠️🚨COPIED from EverybodyWiki ❗❕⚠️😡😤Please respect Licence CC-BY-SA ❗}}
<!--removing this template because now we do not need it. All everybodywiki edit histories have been imported-->

{{translated page|ja|八木氏|version=103135303|comment=Imported full ja history}}

{{draft categories|]


{{everybodywiki link|Yagi clan|Yagi clan}}

[[simple:User:Yagi clan]]

[[ja:八木氏]]
[[fr:User:Immanuelle/Yagi clan]]

[[fr:User:Yagi clan]]

[[ja:Yagi clan]]

<!--all this actually mandates is a completion tier 7 ranking. We are not using the promising draft template here. If I get anywhere near implementing it, I will do so based on the actual completion tiers of this wiki rather than whether I added them when they were on simple english wikipedia or wherever--><!-- Content taken from {{ill|Yagi Castle|en|Yagi Castle|WD=Q11391323|lt=Yagi Castle|1=Yagi Castle}} --><!--Yagi clan--><!--Yagi clan--><!--Yagi clan--><!--Yagi clan--><!--Yagi clan--><!--Yagi clan--><!--Yagi clan--><!--Yagi clan--><!--Yagi clan--><!--Yagi clan-->
<!--jawiki derived wikidata interwikis-->
[[fr:Clan Yagi]]


{{wikidata link|Q11391368}}
[[Category:Clans by region]]
[[Category:Clans of Kyūshū Region]]
[[Category:Japanese clans]]
[[Category:Shinbetsu]]
[[Category:Wikidata no short description]]
[[Category:Yagi clan]]
[[Category:Need translation]]
